channel.title: Xiaomi 12 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 12 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS1.0.33.0.ULIMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 12 Lite Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 12 Lite Global

Codename: taoyao

Version: OS1.0.33.0.ULIMIXM | 14.0

Size: 6.9 GB

MD5: 2fe4c75f9b6ece326c335e3512a02629

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
